title: Interleaving Large Language Models for Compiler Testing.
reason: LLMs generate code for compiler testing; method focuses on semantic correctness via miscompilation bug finding.

title: CURE: Co-Evolving Coders and Unit Testers via Reinforcement Learning
reason: RL framework co-evolving code and test generation; improves test-time scaling and agentic testing for code correctness.

title: Synthesizing Performance Constraints for Evaluating and Improving Code Efficiency
reason: Generates performance-stressing tests via constraint synthesis for LLM code optimization, aligning with reliability and program analysis.

title: Rethinking Verification for LLM Code Generation: From Generation to Testing
reason: Systematic method for improving test-case generation to rigorously evaluate LLM-generated code correctness.

title: Program Synthesis via Test-Time Transduction
reason: Uses LLM in test-time transductive synthesis, improving code robustness via active hypothesis elimination.

title: Dimension-Reduction Attack! Video Generative Models are Experts on Controllable Image Synthesis
reason: Proposes test-time reasoning method (world models) for spatial reasoning, related to structured reasoning for correctness.

title: QAagent: A Multiagent System for Unit Test Generation via Natural Language Pseudocode (Student Abstract)
reason: Multi-agent LLM system for automated unit test generation, directly addressing code reliability.
